TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: rhzyal nyuw ki'an na kinhakul sami ka sun thayluw maha Squliq ka Kinhakul qani ga, pzyang balay whci' rhzyal nyuw myan ki'an samiy. aring pinsbkan kya mstbawn ruw Kb'bu', tayhuk Kayu' na Taycyuw ka Slamaw, ruw qlqalang tay Nango ka Buta', kinguang, Nango, Bongbong, Rumpiya, Syora', ruw kwara' qlqalang na Ulay mstranan, ruw kwara' qlqalang kya Sbtunux ruw kwara' qlqalang Gawgan, ruw maki' tay Sincik hiya' iy ini' lpgiy Mayklpay hya', ga kwara' ka qlqalang lga yasa qasa hya', ruw qalan kya Goho go' ka Mumuyama', ruw kwara' qlqalang kya qsahuy na Walu' kya Nansyo, ruw yaqu qalang Swasiq kya Bunsuy, kwara' ka wal slpuw qani hya' ga yasa qu nyuw ki'an na Kinhajul kwara'. kinwagiq ga nyux naha' ki'an qani hya' ga, pzyang rrawq kinwagiq nya' ga ki'aa yaqu 600„éĚ balay Kaybat niya', ru rayrrawq cikay hya' ga ki'aa yaqu 100„éĚ~800„éĚkinwagiq niya', ruw nanu' qu pzyang wagiq ka maki' tay rgrgyax hya' ga, ki'aa yaqu aring 600„éĚ~2000„éĚ kinwagiq Kaybat niya' hya', cyugal qu ini' ptnaq nyuw naha' ki'an kwara'. qu ini' ptnaq kinwagiq Kaybat qani uzi ga, kwara' kin tl'tu' naha' ruw kinmkilux naha' hya' ga: qmisan ka aring byacing thayluw ka 12 byacing ruw mucing 2 byacing hya' iy rrawq kinwagiq kaybat hya' ga mutuw aring 15‚ĄÉ~22‚ĄÉ kintl'tu' niya'. rayrrawq cikay kaybat hya' ga mutuw aring 10‚ĄÉ~18‚ĄÉ kintl'tu' niya'. pzyang wagiq kaybat hya' ga mutuw aring -2‚ĄÉ~15‚ĄÉkintl'tu' niya'. mayhlhul cikay ka ttunga abaw ka 3 byacing ruw mucing 5 byacing hya' iy rrawq kinwagiq kaybat hya' ga mutuw aring 16‚ĄÉ~24‚ĄÉ kintl'tu' niya'. rayrrawq cikay kaybat hya' ga mutuw aring 14‚ĄÉ~22‚ĄÉ kintl'tu' niya'. pzyang wagiq kaybat hya' ga mutuw aring 10‚ĄÉ~20‚ĄÉ kintl'tu' niya'. 'bagan ka aring byacing thayluw ka 6 byacing ruw mucing 8 byacing hya' iy rrawq kinwagiq kaybat hya' ga mutuw aring 20‚ĄÉ~30‚ĄÉ kintl'tu' niya'. rayrrawq cikay kaybat hya' ga mutuw aring 18‚ĄÉ~26‚ĄÉ kintl'tu' niya'. pzyang wagiq kaybat hya' ga mutuw aring 15‚ĄÉ~28‚ĄÉ kintl'tu' niya'. mayghzyaq ka hawqan abaw hya' ga aring byacing thayluw ka 9 byacing ruw mucing 11 byacing hya' iy rrawq kinwagiq kaybat hya' ga mutuw aring 20‚ĄÉ~28‚ĄÉ kintl'tu' niya'. rayrrawq cikay kaybat hya' ga mutuw aring 18‚ĄÉ~26‚ĄÉ kintl'tu' niya'. pzyang wagiq kaybat hya' ga mutuw aring 15‚ĄÉ~26‚ĄÉ kintl'tu' niya'. aring sraral kki'an qalang tayal hiya' ga, yalaw yasa mnaki' sa rgrgyax wagiq ru, giway maki' sa aring bay'nux ruw mucing 40ňö kinmkrkyas kwara' ki'an naha'. nanu' yasa qu ktan twahiq lga siy giway mtqutux zyamang ktan, ruw ini' ptnaq uzi kinwhci' mttaykuy bay'nux qu cyuw naha' ki'an kwara'. ana qu qqmayah naha' uziy ga ini' ptnaq kwara' uzi kinwhci' nya' uziy, nanu' qu yan qani ka yaqih balay na ppqmahan ka qnxan naha' qani ga ki'aa wal sa pira' kinbhlan kawas inrasan na qnxan naha' qani la.
S.PHON: rńßzjal njuw ki Ēan na kinńßakul s~…ēami ka s~…ēun tńßajluw mańßa s~…ēquliq ka kinńßakul qani …£a, pzjaŇč ő≤alaj wńß ¶~ ®i Ē rńßzjal njuw mjan ki Ēan s~…ēamij. ariŇč pins~…ēő≤kan kja ms~…ētő≤awn ruw kő≤ Ēő≤u Ē, tajńßuk kaju Ē na taj ¶~ ®juw ka s~…ēlamaw, ruw qlqalaŇč taj naŇčo ka ő≤uta Ē, kiŇčuaŇč, naŇčo, ő≤oŇčő≤oŇč, rumpija, s~…ējora Ē, ruw kwara Ē qlqalaŇč na ulaj ms~…ētranan, ruw kwara Ē qlqalaŇč kja s~…ēő≤tunux ruw kwara Ē qlqalaŇč …£aw…£an, ruw maki Ē taj s~…ēin ¶~ ®ik ńßija Ē ij ini Ē lp…£ij majklpaj ńßja Ē, …£a kwara Ē ka qlqalaŇč l…£a jas~…ēa qas~…ēa ńßja Ē, ruw qalan kja …£ońßo …£o Ē ka mumujama Ē, ruw kwara Ē qlqalaŇč kja qs~…ēańßuj na walu Ē kja nans~…ējo, ruw jaqu qalaŇč s~…ēwas~…ēiq kja ő≤uns~…ēuj, kwara Ē ka wal s~…ēlpuw qani ńßja Ē …£a jas~…ēa qu njuw ki Ēan na kinńßajul kwara Ē. kinwa…£iq …£a njux nańßa Ē ki Ēan qani ńßja Ē …£a, pzjaŇč rrawq kinwa…£iq nja Ē …£a ki Ēaa jaqu **** ő≤alaj kajő≤at nija Ē, ru rajrrawq ¶~ ®ikaj ńßja Ē …£a ki Ēaa jaqu ****~****kinwa…£iq nija Ē, ruw nanu Ē qu pzjaŇč wa…£iq ka maki Ē taj r…£r…£jax ńßja Ē …£a, ki Ēaa jaqu ariŇč ****~***** kinwa…£iq kajő≤at nija Ē ńßja Ē, ¶~ ®ju…£al qu ini Ē ptnaq njuw nańßa Ē ki Ēan kwara Ē. qu ini Ē ptnaq kinwa…£iq kajő≤at qani uzi …£a, kwara Ē kin tl Ētu Ē nańßa Ē ruw kinmkilux nańßa Ē ńßja Ē …£a: qmis~…ēan ka ariŇč ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč tńßajluw ka ** ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ruw mu ¶~ ®iŇč * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ńßja Ē ij rrawq kinwa…£iq kajő≤at ńßja Ē …£a mutuw ariŇč ***~*** kintl Ētu Ē nija Ē. rajrrawq ¶~ ®ikaj kajő≤at ńßja Ē …£a mutuw ariŇč ***~*** kintl Ētu Ē nija Ē. pzjaŇč wa…£iq kajő≤at ńßja Ē …£a mutuw ariŇč -**~***kintl Ētu Ē nija Ē. majńßlńßul ¶~ ®ikaj ka ttuŇča aő≤aw ka * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ruw mu ¶~ ®iŇč * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ńßja Ē ij rrawq kinwa…£iq kajő≤at ńßja Ē …£a mutuw ariŇč ***~*** kintl Ētu Ē nija Ē. rajrrawq ¶~ ®ikaj kajő≤at ńßja Ē …£a mutuw ariŇč ***~*** kintl Ētu Ē nija Ē. pzjaŇč wa…£iq kajő≤at ńßja Ē …£a mutuw ariŇč ***~*** kintl Ētu Ē nija Ē. Ēő≤a…£an ka ariŇč ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč tńßajluw ka * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ruw mu ¶~ ®iŇč * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ńßja Ē ij rrawq kinwa…£iq kajő≤at ńßja Ē …£a mutuw ariŇč ***~*** kintl Ētu Ē nija Ē. rajrrawq ¶~ ®ikaj kajő≤at ńßja Ē …£a mutuw ariŇč ***~*** kintl Ētu Ē nija Ē. pzjaŇč wa…£iq kajő≤at ńßja Ē …£a mutuw ariŇč ***~*** kintl Ētu Ē nija Ē. maj…£ńßzjaq ka ńßawqan aő≤aw ńßja Ē …£a ariŇč ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč tńßajluw ka * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ruw mu ¶~ ®iŇč ** ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ńßja Ē ij rrawq kinwa…£iq kajő≤at ńßja Ē …£a mutuw ariŇč ***~*** kintl Ētu Ē nija Ē. rajrrawq ¶~ ®ikaj kajő≤at ńßja Ē …£a mutuw ariŇč ***~*** kintl Ētu Ē nija Ē. pzjaŇč wa…£iq kajő≤at ńßja Ē …£a mutuw ariŇč ***~*** kintl Ētu Ē nija Ē. ariŇč s~…ēraral kki Ēan qalaŇč tajal ńßija Ē …£a, jalaw jas~…ēa mnaki Ē s~…ēa r…£r…£jax wa…£iq ru, …£iwaj maki Ē s~…ēa ariŇč ő≤aj Ēnux ruw mu ¶~ ®iŇč *** kinmkrkjas~…ē kwara Ē ki Ēan nańßa Ē. nanu Ē jas~…ēa qu ktan twańßiq l…£a s~…ēij …£iwaj mtqutux zjamaŇč ktan, ruw ini Ē ptnaq uzi kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē mttajkuj ő≤aj Ēnux qu ¶~ ®juw nańßa Ē ki Ēan kwara Ē. ana qu qqmajańß nańßa Ē uzij …£a ini Ē ptnaq kwara Ē uzi kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nja Ē uzij, nanu Ē qu jan qani ka jaqińß ő≤alaj na ppqmańßan ka qnxan nańßa Ē qani …£a ki Ēaa wal s~…ēa pira Ē kinő≤ńßlan kawas~…ē inras~…ēan na qnxan nańßa Ē qani la.
S.FORM: rhzyal nyuw ki'an na kinhakul sami ka sun thayluw maha Squliq ka Kinhakul qani ga, pzyang balay whci' rhzyal nyuw myan ki'an samiy. aring pinsbkan kya mstbawn ruw Kb'bu', tayhuk Kayu' na Taycyuw ka Slamaw, ruw qlqalang tay Nango ka Buta', kinguang, Nango, Bongbong, Rumpiya, Syora', ruw kwara' qlqalang na Ulay mstranan, ruw kwara' qlqalang kya Sbtunux ruw kwara' qlqalang Gawgan, ruw maki' tay Sincik hiya' iy ini' lpgiy Mayklpay hya', ga kwara' ka qlqalang lga yasa qasa hya', ruw qalan kya Goho go' ka Mumuyama', ruw kwara' qlqalang kya qsahuy na Walu' kya Nansyo, ruw yaqu qalang Swasiq kya Bunsuy, kwara' ka wal slpuw qani hya' ga yasa qu nyuw ki'an na Kinhajul kwara'. kinwagiq ga nyux naha' ki'an qani hya' ga, pzyang rrawq kinwagiq nya' ga ki'aa yaqu 600„éĚ balay Kaybat niya', ru rayrrawq cikay hya' ga ki'aa yaqu 100„éĚ~800„éĚkinwagiq niya', ruw nanu' qu pzyang wagiq ka maki' tay rgrgyax hya' ga, ki'aa yaqu aring 600„éĚ~2000„éĚ kinwagiq Kaybat niya' hya', cyugal qu ini' ptnaq nyuw naha' ki'an kwara'. qu ini' ptnaq kinwagiq Kaybat qani uzi ga, kwara' kin tl'tu' naha' ruw kinmkilux naha' hya' ga: qmisan ka aring byacing thayluw ka 12 byacing ruw mucing 2 byacing hya' iy rrawq kinwagiq kaybat hya' ga mutuw aring 15‚ĄÉ~22‚ĄÉ kintl'tu' niya'. rayrrawq cikay kaybat hya' ga mutuw aring 10‚ĄÉ~18‚ĄÉ kintl'tu' niya'. pzyang wagiq kaybat hya' ga mutuw aring -2‚ĄÉ~15‚ĄÉkintl'tu' niya'. mayhlhul cikay ka ttunga abaw ka 3 byacing ruw mucing 5 byacing hya' iy rrawq kinwagiq kaybat hya' ga mutuw aring 16‚ĄÉ~24‚ĄÉ kintl'tu' niya'. rayrrawq cikay kaybat hya' ga mutuw aring 14‚ĄÉ~22‚ĄÉ kintl'tu' niya'. pzyang wagiq kaybat hya' ga mutuw aring 10‚ĄÉ~20‚ĄÉ kintl'tu' niya'. 'bagan ka aring byacing thayluw ka 6 byacing ruw mucing 8 byacing hya' iy rrawq kinwagiq kaybat hya' ga mutuw aring 20‚ĄÉ~30‚ĄÉ kintl'tu' niya'. rayrrawq cikay kaybat hya' ga mutuw aring 18‚ĄÉ~26‚ĄÉ kintl'tu' niya'. pzyang wagiq kaybat hya' ga mutuw aring 15‚ĄÉ~28‚ĄÉ kintl'tu' niya'. mayghzyaq ka hawqan abaw hya' ga aring byacing thayluw ka 9 byacing ruw mucing 11 byacing hya' iy rrawq kinwagiq kaybat hya' ga mutuw aring 20‚ĄÉ~28‚ĄÉ kintl'tu' niya'. rayrrawq cikay kaybat hya' ga mutuw aring 18‚ĄÉ~26‚ĄÉ kintl'tu' niya'. pzyang wagiq kaybat hya' ga mutuw aring 15‚ĄÉ~26‚ĄÉ kintl'tu' niya'. aring sraral kki'an qalang tayal hiya' ga, yalaw yasa mnaki' sa rgrgyax wagiq ru, giway maki' sa aring bay'nux ruw mucing 40ňö kinmkrkyas kwara' ki'an naha'. nanu' yasa qu ktan twahiq lga siy giway mtqutux zyamang ktan, ruw ini' ptnaq uzi kinwhci' mttaykuy bay'nux qu cyuw naha' ki'an kwara'. ana qu qqmayah naha' uziy ga ini' ptnaq kwara' uzi kinwhci' nya' uziy, nanu' qu yan qani ka yaqih balay na ppqmahan ka qnxan naha' qani ga ki'aa wal sa pira' kinbhlan kawas inrasan na qnxan naha' qani la.
S.PHON: rńßzjal njuw ki Ēan na kinńßakul s~…ēami ka s~…ēun tńßajluw mańßa s~…ēquliq ka kinńßakul qani …£a, pzjaŇč ő≤alaj wńß ¶~ ®i Ē rńßzjal njuw mjan ki Ēan s~…ēamij. ariŇč pins~…ēő≤kan kja ms~…ētő≤awn ruw kő≤ Ēő≤u Ē, tajńßuk kaju Ē na taj ¶~ ®juw ka s~…ēlamaw, ruw qlqalaŇč taj naŇčo ka ő≤uta Ē, kiŇčuaŇč, naŇčo, ő≤oŇčő≤oŇč, rumpija, s~…ējora Ē, ruw kwara Ē qlqalaŇč na ulaj ms~…ētranan, ruw kwara Ē qlqalaŇč kja s~…ēő≤tunux ruw kwara Ē qlqalaŇč …£aw…£an, ruw maki Ē taj s~…ēin ¶~ ®ik ńßija Ē ij ini Ē lp…£ij majklpaj ńßja Ē, …£a kwara Ē ka qlqalaŇč l…£a jas~…ēa qas~…ēa ńßja Ē, ruw qalan kja …£ońßo …£o Ē ka mumujama Ē, ruw kwara Ē qlqalaŇč kja qs~…ēańßuj na walu Ē kja nans~…ējo, ruw jaqu qalaŇč s~…ēwas~…ēiq kja ő≤uns~…ēuj, kwara Ē ka wal s~…ēlpuw qani ńßja Ē …£a jas~…ēa qu njuw ki Ēan na kinńßajul kwara Ē. kinwa…£iq …£a njux nańßa Ē ki Ēan qani ńßja Ē …£a, pzjaŇč rrawq kinwa…£iq nja Ē …£a ki Ēaa jaqu **** ő≤alaj kajő≤at nija Ē, ru rajrrawq ¶~ ®ikaj ńßja Ē …£a ki Ēaa jaqu ****~****kinwa…£iq nija Ē, ruw nanu Ē qu pzjaŇč wa…£iq ka maki Ē taj r…£r…£jax ńßja Ē …£a, ki Ēaa jaqu ariŇč ****~***** kinwa…£iq kajő≤at nija Ē ńßja Ē, ¶~ ®ju…£al qu ini Ē ptnaq njuw nańßa Ē ki Ēan kwara Ē. qu ini Ē ptnaq kinwa…£iq kajő≤at qani uzi …£a, kwara Ē kin tl Ētu Ē nańßa Ē ruw kinmkilux nańßa Ē ńßja Ē …£a: qmis~…ēan ka ariŇč ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč tńßajluw ka ** ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ruw mu ¶~ ®iŇč * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ńßja Ē ij rrawq kinwa…£iq kajő≤at ńßja Ē …£a mutuw ariŇč ***~*** kintl Ētu Ē nija Ē. rajrrawq ¶~ ®ikaj kajő≤at ńßja Ē …£a mutuw ariŇč ***~*** kintl Ētu Ē nija Ē. pzjaŇč wa…£iq kajő≤at ńßja Ē …£a mutuw ariŇč -**~***kintl Ētu Ē nija Ē. majńßlńßul ¶~ ®ikaj ka ttuŇča aő≤aw ka * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ruw mu ¶~ ®iŇč * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ńßja Ē ij rrawq kinwa…£iq kajő≤at ńßja Ē …£a mutuw ariŇč ***~*** kintl Ētu Ē nija Ē. rajrrawq ¶~ ®ikaj kajő≤at ńßja Ē …£a mutuw ariŇč ***~*** kintl Ētu Ē nija Ē. pzjaŇč wa…£iq kajő≤at ńßja Ē …£a mutuw ariŇč ***~*** kintl Ētu Ē nija Ē. Ēő≤a…£an ka ariŇč ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč tńßajluw ka * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ruw mu ¶~ ®iŇč * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ńßja Ē ij rrawq kinwa…£iq kajő≤at ńßja Ē …£a mutuw ariŇč ***~*** kintl Ētu Ē nija Ē. rajrrawq ¶~ ®ikaj kajő≤at ńßja Ē …£a mutuw ariŇč ***~*** kintl Ētu Ē nija Ē. pzjaŇč wa…£iq kajő≤at ńßja Ē …£a mutuw ariŇč ***~*** kintl Ētu Ē nija Ē. maj…£ńßzjaq ka ńßawqan aő≤aw ńßja Ē …£a ariŇč ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč tńßajluw ka * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ruw mu ¶~ ®iŇč ** ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ńßja Ē ij rrawq kinwa…£iq kajő≤at ńßja Ē …£a mutuw ariŇč ***~*** kintl Ētu Ē nija Ē. rajrrawq ¶~ ®ikaj kajő≤at ńßja Ē …£a mutuw ariŇč ***~*** kintl Ētu Ē nija Ē. pzjaŇč wa…£iq kajő≤at ńßja Ē …£a mutuw ariŇč ***~*** kintl Ētu Ē nija Ē. ariŇč s~…ēraral kki Ēan qalaŇč tajal ńßija Ē …£a, jalaw jas~…ēa mnaki Ē s~…ēa r…£r…£jax wa…£iq ru, …£iwaj maki Ē s~…ēa ariŇč ő≤aj Ēnux ruw mu ¶~ ®iŇč *** kinmkrkjas~…ē kwara Ē ki Ēan nańßa Ē. nanu Ē jas~…ēa qu ktan twańßiq l…£a s~…ēij …£iwaj mtqutux zjamaŇč ktan, ruw ini Ē ptnaq uzi kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē mttajkuj ő≤aj Ēnux qu ¶~ ®juw nańßa Ē ki Ēan kwara Ē. ana qu qqmajańß nańßa Ē uzij …£a ini Ē ptnaq kwara Ē uzi kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nja Ē uzij, nanu Ē qu jan qani ka jaqińß ő≤alaj na ppqmańßan ka qnxan nańßa Ē qani …£a ki Ēaa wal s~…ēa pira Ē kinő≤ńßlan kawas~…ē inras~…ēan na qnxan nańßa Ē qani la.
